title: Potatonomore+
description: Potatonomore+ boosts performance and adds quality-of-life improvements for a smoother, more enjoyable Minecraft experience. 🚀
body:
# Welcome to Potato-no-more+!
Potatonomore+ is a modpack designed for players who want the best of both worlds—performance optimization and quality-of-life improvements—without the hassle of installing each mod separately. This carefully curated collection enhances gameplay, boosts FPS, reduces lag, and adds useful features to make Minecraft smoother and more enjoyable. 🚀✨
## 📢 Important Info 📢
- This version includes both performance enhancements and quality-of-life mods for a well-rounded experience.

<details>
<summary>🚀 Perfomance Mods 🚀</summary>

- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)

</details>

<details>
<summary>📜 QoL Mods 📜</summary>

- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers)
- [Bactro Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/bactromod)
- [Better F1 Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-f1-reborn)
- [Better Mount Hud](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mount-hud)
- [Better Grassify](https://modrinth.com/mod/bettergrassify)
- [Blur+](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-plus)
- [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes)
- [Cave Dust](https://modrinth.com/mod/cave-dust)
- [Cherished Worlds](https://modrinth.com/mod/cherished-worlds)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
- [Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify)
- [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling)
- [E4MC](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc)
- [Fabrishot](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabrishot)
- [Fast Quit](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastquit)
- [Gamma Utils](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils)
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [Lamb Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)
- [Lighty](https://modrinth.com/mod/lighty)
- [Make Bubbles Pop](https://modrinth.com/mod/make_bubbles_pop)
- [MiniHud](https://modrinth.com/mod/minihud)
- [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix)
- [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks)
- [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations)
- [Particle Rain](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-rain)
- [Particular](https://modrinth.com/mod/particular)
- [Show Me Your Skin](https://modrinth.com/mod/show-me-your-skin)
- [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality)
- [Wakes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wakes)
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)

</details>
